chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.S-226 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For orders on CMA No.642/2022 3. For hearing of main case 06-03-2023 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Z.A.Channa, Advocate for Respondent No.4 Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General a/w SIP Ahmed Ali Shar SHO Police Station Site Area Sukkur and ASI Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP Sukkur.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Deferred. 2 & 3. The applicant by way of instant petition has sought for custody of her daughter Mst. Shazia, who as per her is confined illegally by the private respondents. It is stated by learned counsel for the respondents that the petitioner has married at least for four times; Mst. Shazia, the alleged detenue is residing with her and she in order to grab money from the private respondents is involving them in false litigation off and on. Be that as it may, the petitioner to produce B-Form of Mst. Shazia together with her photograph for further action. Adjourned to be fixed after three week. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
